titleStmt.title: SII 6.778: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 778. (A.R. No. 274-A of 1899). ON THE ELEVENTH ROUND PILLAR IN THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vīraśrī gajapati gauḍesara navakoṭi karnāṭa kalavarakesara . suvanakesarī govindadeu māhāraājāṅkara vije subharāije samasta 4
śrāhi . vīcchādi 13 kī 13 somavāre . śrīkaraṇa paṭanāekā śrīha� paṭanāeṅka govere jāara deulara vaṅasamṣaradā dasa gokṣīre ḍākāramāna
ṅkara delākere patra . Āmbhara varatana desa padravāḍa bhūi bhitaro kāliārama toṭākū Uttara rājadāṇḍakū pūrvagaḍākū dakṣiṇa tentulī ga
cchakū pascima . E maddhire bhūi khaṇḍe . paramesvarakū toṭākarivā nimattoḥ semūiki sasakānāṭa 8 Āṭha ṭaṅkā gheni . E bhūi tumbhaṅkū Ā
cyandrārka sthāi kari . nidhinikṣepakūpapāsāṇasahitaṅka E dhārāpūrva kari thilṛ [.] Ethiki jñātisāmantapūrva Ādhi dāna kere virodha thile
Āmbhetū lāu . Ethū Āna volā na pāi . Ethakū sākhi pā�parakaparakaṇe narasiṅghapātra [.] siṅghupasūpāleka Āce Āpasūpāleka nara
saṅgha paṭato kulasekhara Āna . gāi mudrahasta kī pramāṇa narasiṅghare ḍīpakiṇḍareḍi bhagavāna pātra . Ubhae Anumate sākṣi vaḍasampa
radādasa gokṣīre ḍīkāramānaṅkana sanamata [.]
Digital edition of SII 6.778 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
